author: Tib-Gridello
title: Work Queue Sort Key Crash: _natural_sort_key Produces Heterogeneous Tuples
notes: _natural_sort_key returns 4-element tuples for subjective items and 6-element tuples for mechanical items at the same _RANK_ISSUE level. When estimated_impact ties (common when dimension_scores is empty) and element[2] ties (subjective_score_value matches a CONFIDENCE_ORDER int), Python compares str vs float at element[3], causing TypeError. Even without the crash, cross-comparing subjective_score (0-100) vs confidence_order (0-2) means mechanical items almost always sort first, contradicting the documented ranking factors. Both bugs confirmed at snapshot commit 6eb2065.
